prompt_used: This is Bell Keeper Tomas Grell. I should not be leaving this message. Something about burned vellum fragment is wrong, and The Creditor wants us to panic before anyone checks the chain of custody. Survive and protect a secret. Please move quietly when you come to cliffside cathedral archive district.
